title: Space Ambient [Addon for Galacticraft]
description: Space Ambient - it's galacticraft addon for more ambient music on the celestial bodies.
body:
# [Main Page is on CurseForge!](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/space-ambient-addon-for-galacticraft)  Developed and Maintained by BlesseNtumble.

# About :

Space Ambient - it's galacticraft addon for more ambient music on the celestial bodies.

## Discord: 

- Modification of the add-on is forbidden!
- Forbidden steal code or assets.
- Release or post mod on any other site without link on this page.
